docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,100.00 FILED BY GRECH, KALI AS TO DEFENDANT BATIN, XIOMARA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED JUL-24-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BATIN, XIOMARA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. PLAINTIFF ARRIVED AT 8:57AM BY THEN DEFENDANT HAD LEFT THE COURTROOM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
